name: GeoContext Agent
description: Tells you what's around a location: nearby EPA-regulated contamination sources from EPA ECHO, nearby land use / natural features / amenities / industrial infrastructure from OpenStreetMap, ground elevation and slope from USGS, and the FEMA-mapped flood zone.

skills.name: Find nearby contamination sources
skills.description: Looks up EPA-regulated facilities near a location (geocoding it first if needed) and reports their compliance/violation status - potential contamination sources.
examples: What are potential sources of contamination near 5700 Arsenal St, St. Louis, MO?
Are there any EPA violators within a mile of these camera trap coordinates: 38.627, -90.1994?
List regulated facilities near the Cahokia Mounds site and flag any significant violators.

skills.name: Analyze proximity to zone
skills.description: Pulls nearby land-use, natural, amenity, leisure, and industrial features from OpenStreetMap (via Overpass), with distances - geocodes the location first if it's given as a place name.
examples: What's near Forest Park in St. Louis — is it near any industrial zones?
Is this area suitable habitat for a species that needs wetland: 38.627, -90.1994?
What zone (residential, commercial, industrial) is this camera trap location in?

skills.name: Look up elevation and slope
skills.description: Looks up ground elevation via USGS EPQS (3DEP) and estimates local slope from nearby sample points - geocodes the location first if it's given as a place name.
examples: What's the elevation and slope at 38.627, -90.1994?
Is this camera trap site on a ridge or in a valley?
How steep is the terrain near Forest Park in St. Louis?

skills.name: Look up FEMA flood zone
skills.description: Looks up the FEMA-mapped flood hazard zone at a location via the National Flood Hazard Layer - geocodes the location first if it's given as a place name.
examples: What FEMA flood zone is 5700 Arsenal St, St. Louis, MO in?
Is this site in a Special Flood Hazard Area: 38.627, -90.1994?
What's the base flood elevation near the riverfront in St. Louis?
